customerDashboard.title: Dashboard
customerDashboard.description: Manage your bookings and vehicle requests in one place.

stats.tripsDescription: Live trips currently on the road

comingSoonCharts.sectionDescription: Charts and trends for your booking history will appear here.
comingSoonCharts.bookingsTrendDescription: Your booking volume over the last 30 days
comingSoonCharts.spendingTrendDescription: Trip costs and billing totals over time
comingSoonCharts.tripTypesDescription: Breakdown of your most requested vehicle classes

customerRequests.title: Request Ride
customerRequests.description: Tell us where to pick you up and where you are going. Our dispatch team will review and assign a vehicle.
customerRequests.formDescription: Fill in your trip details below. You can track submitted requests in the list underneath.
customerRequests.sectionRouteDescription: Choose your pickup and drop-off points. Saved locations are shown first.
customerRequests.sectionTripDetailsDescription: Vehicle preferences, passengers, and pickup timing.
customerRequests.sectionNotesDescription: Share anything dispatch should know before assigning a vehicle.
customerRequests.regionFilterHint: Filter saved locations by region. Leave empty to see all available sites.
customerRequests.submitHint: Dispatch will review your request and assign a vehicle.
customerRequests.savedLocationHint: Choose from the saved locations configured for your region.
customerRequests.savedLocationSelectedHint: Saved location selected. Clear the dropdown or edit the address to set a custom point on the map.
customerRequests.backupLocationHint: Enter a custom address and pin the exact point on the map.
customerRequests.noPickupLocations: No saved pickup locations are available for the selected region.
customerRequests.noDropoffLocations: No saved drop-off locations are available for the selected region.
customerRequests.mapPickerHint: Click the map or drag the pin to set the exact location.
customerRequests.mapEmpty: No point selected on the map yet
customerRequests.scheduledAtHint: Leave both empty if you need the ride as soon as possible.
customerRequests.notesPlaceholder: Flight number, contact at gate, luggage details…
customerRequests.noVehicleTypes: No vehicle types are available right now.
customerRequests.noVehicleClasses: No classes are available for the selected vehicle type.
customerRequests.noRegions: No regions are available right now.
customerRequests.submitDisabledNoPermission: You do not have permission to submit ride requests.
customerRequests.recentDescription: Your five most recent submissions. Open My Requests for the full history.
customerRequests.emptyDescription: Submit your first ride request using the form above.

errors.pickupCoordinatesRequired: Select the pickup point on the map.
errors.dropoffCoordinatesRequired: Select the drop-off point on the map.
errors.passengerCountInvalid: Enter a valid passenger count between 1 and 50.
errors.passengerExceedsCapacity: Passenger count exceeds the selected vehicle capacity ({capacity}).
errors.vehicleClassRequiresType: Select a vehicle type before choosing a vehicle class.
errors.vehicleClassInvalid: Selected vehicle class is not available for this vehicle type.
errors.scheduledAtPast: Pickup time must be in the future.
errors.scheduledAtIncomplete: Select both a pickup date and time, or leave both empty.

customerRequestHistory.title: My Requests
customerRequestHistory.description: Review, update, or cancel your submitted ride requests.

stats.title: Total requests
stats.description: All ride requests you have submitted

customerRequestHistory.tableDescription: Filter by status or search by address. Pending requests can be edited until dispatch confirms them.
customerRequestHistory.cancelDescription: This will mark the request as cancelled. You can submit a new request anytime.
customerRequestHistory.editDescription: Update trip details while dispatch has not confirmed this request yet.
customerRequestHistory.detailDescription: Full summary of your submitted ride request.
customerRequestHistory.detailRejectionReasonHint: Provided by dispatch when this request was rejected.
customerRequestHistory.detailMapEmpty: No map coordinates available for this request.
customerRequestHistory.policyEdit: You can edit this request while it is still pending.
customerRequestHistory.policyCancel: You can cancel within 15 minutes of submitting while the request is pending.
customerRequestHistory.policyLocked: This request can no longer be changed from your account.
customerRequestHistory.notEditable: Only pending requests can be edited.
customerRequestHistory.notCancellable: Cancellation is only available for pending requests within 15 minutes of submission.
customerRequestHistory.emptyDescription: Your ride requests will appear here after you submit them.
customerRequestHistory.emptySearchDescription: Try a different search term or clear the status filter.

adminNotificationTemplates.title: Message templates
adminNotificationTemplates.description: Configure email and SMS messages for ride requests and user registration approval across the platform.

placeholders.title: Message placeholders
placeholders.description: Insert these tokens in email subjects and message bodies. They are replaced with real data when a notification is sent.
placeholders.warning: Only use the placeholders listed above. Unknown tokens such as {customer_name} will not be replaced and will appear literally in the message. The system will reject saves that include unsupported placeholders.

rideRequests.title: Ride requests & dispatch
rideRequests.description: Available for all ride request notification templates.

userRegistrations.title: User registrations

test.title: Send test message
test.descriptionEmail: Deliver this template to your inbox using sample placeholder data.
test.descriptionSms: Deliver this template to a phone number using sample placeholder data.
test.previewNote: Test messages replace placeholders with sample values such as Jane Doe and Bole International Airport.

test.recipientRequired: Enter a recipient before sending the test.
test.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number with country code.

shell.modulePickerDescription: Choose which workflows these messages apply to.

userRegistrations.title: User registrations
userRegistrations.description: Messages sent when a customer registers and their account is approved or declined.

created.title: Request submitted
created.description: Sent when a customer submits a new ride request.

confirmed.title: Request approved
confirmed.description: Sent when an admin approves a ride request.

rejected.title: Request declined
rejected.description: Sent when an admin rejects a ride request.

assigned.title: Vehicle assigned
assigned.description: Sent when a vehicle and driver are assigned to a trip.

started.title: Trip started
started.description: Sent when the trip moves to in progress.

completed.title: Trip completed
completed.description: Sent when the trip is marked complete.

cancelled.title: Request cancelled
cancelled.description: Sent when a customer cancels a pending request.

submitted.title: Registration submitted
submitted.description: Sent when a customer completes the sign-up form.

approved.title: Registration approved
approved.description: Sent when an admin activates the customer account.

rejected.title: Registration declined
rejected.description: Sent when an admin rejects a pending registration.

form.createDescription: Add a location with a region and GPS coordinates.
form.editDescription: Update location details, region, and coordinates.
form.name: Name

sections.identityDescription: How this location appears in dispatch lists and reports.
sections.placementDescription: Assign a region and optional street address.
sections.coordinatesDescription: Latitude and longitude used for routing and map display.
sections.mapPickerHint: Click the map or drag the pin to set the location. You can fine-tune the values below.
sections.mapEmpty: Click the map to set a location
sections.isActiveOn: This location is available for dispatch.
sections.isActiveOff: This location is hidden from dispatch.
sections.isActiveDescription: Inactive locations remain in the system but cannot be selected for new dispatches.
sections.usageDescription: Control whether this location can be selected for pickup, drop-off, or both.
sections.canPickupDescription: Customers can choose this location as a pickup point when booking.
sections.canDropoffDescription: Customers can choose this location as a drop-off point when booking.

errors.usageRequired: Enable pickup or drop-off usage for this location.

adminFarePlans.title: Fare Plans
adminFarePlans.description: Configure pricing rules by vehicle type, class, region, and pricing model.

pricingModelHelp.flat: Fixed price per trip regardless of distance or duration.
pricingModelHelp.distance: Charge by distance traveled using a base fare plus per km rate.
pricingModelHelp.time: Charge by trip duration using a base fare plus per minute rate.
pricingModelHelp.distance_time: Combine distance and time for on-demand ride-hail style pricing.
pricingModelHelp.hourly: Charter pricing billed by the hour with a minimum booking duration.

empty.title: No fare plans found
empty.description: Fare plans will appear here once they are created.

accessDenied.title: You do not have permission
accessDenied.description: View access to fare plans is required to open this page.
accessDenied.sessionHint: If permissions were changed recently, sign out and sign in again to refresh your session.
accessDenied.permissionNote: Access is controlled by your role permissions.

stats.title: Total fare plans
stats.description: All pricing rules configured in the platform
stats.activeDescription: Plans currently available for fare calculation
stats.distanceTimeDescription: Plans using combined distance and time pricing

form.createDescription: Create a fare plan with at least an English name and pricing details.
form.editDescription: Update fare plan details, scope, and pricing rules.
form.name: Name

sections.identityDescription: How this fare plan appears in admin lists and reports.
sections.scopeDescription: Limit the plan to a vehicle type, class, and/or region, or leave blank for all.
sections.pricingDescription: Set the pricing model and rate components used for fare calculation.
sections.rulesDescription: Priority, waiting allowance, waiting fees, and availability.

form.perHourRateHelp: Hourly charter rate before minimum hours are applied.
form.perMinuteRateHelp: Applied to trip duration while the vehicle is in service.
form.minimumHoursHelp: Minimum billable hours. Total minimum charge is calculated automatically.
form.freeWaitingMinutesHelp: Idle time at pickup or stops that is included at no extra charge.
form.waitingFeePerMinuteHelp: Charged for each minute of waiting after the free waiting period ends.
form.priorityHelp: Higher priority plans are matched first when multiple rules apply.
form.isActiveOn: This plan is available for fare calculation.
form.isActiveOff: This plan is hidden from fare calculation.

errors.baseFareInvalid: Enter a valid base fare (0 or greater).
errors.rateInvalid: Enter a valid amount (0 or greater).
errors.hoursInvalid: Enter valid minimum hours (0 or greater).
errors.priorityInvalid: Enter a valid priority (0 or greater).
errors.waitingInvalid: Enter valid free waiting minutes (0 or greater).

deleteFailed.title: Delete failed
deleteFailed.description: Could not delete the fare plan.

loadFailed.title: Load failed
loadFailed.description: Could not load the fare plan.

adminAuditLogs.title: Audit logs
adminAuditLogs.description: Review user and admin activity across the platform.
adminAuditLogs.searchPlaceholder: Search by actor, summary, path, or target...

empty.title: No audit entries found
empty.description: Activity will appear here as users perform actions.
empty.searchDescription: Try a different search or filter.

accessDenied.title: You do not have permission
accessDenied.description: View access to audit logs is required to open this page. Ask an administrator to grant the audit_logs.read permission for your role.
accessDenied.sessionHint: If permissions were changed recently, sign out and sign in again to refresh your session.
accessDenied.permissionNote: Access is controlled by your role permissions.

detail.title: Audit entry details
detail.description: Full context for this recorded action.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load audit log details.

adminPermissions.title: Permissions
adminPermissions.description: View and manage permission slugs used for role-based access control across the platform.
adminPermissions.searchPlaceholder: Search by slug, module, action, or description...

empty.title: No permissions found
empty.description: Permissions will appear here once they are created.

stats.title: Total permissions
stats.description: All permissions defined in the platform

form.createDescription: Create a permission with a unique slug, module, and action.
form.editDescription: Update the permission slug, module, action, and description.

createSuccess.title: Permission created
createSuccess.description: The new permission is now available in the platform.

updateSuccess.title: Permission updated
updateSuccess.description: Your changes have been saved successfully.

loadFailed.title: Could not load permission
loadFailed.description: Please try again or refresh the page.

createFailed.title: Could not create permission
createFailed.description: Please check the form and try again.

updateFailed.title: Could not update permission
updateFailed.description: Please check the form and try again.

deleteFailed.title: Could not delete permission
deleteFailed.description: Please try again in a moment.

adminEndpoints.title: Endpoints
adminEndpoints.description: View and manage API route definitions, HTTP methods, and linked permissions.
adminEndpoints.searchPlaceholder: Search by path, slug, or method...

empty.title: No endpoints found
empty.description: Endpoints will appear here once they are registered.

stats.title: Total endpoints
stats.description: All API routes registered in the platform

form.createDescription: Register an API route with a unique slug, HTTP method, and path.
form.editDescription: Update the endpoint slug, method, path, permission, and status.
form.slugHelp: Lowercase identifier used to reference this endpoint.
form.pathHelp: Route path as defined in the API (e.g. /api/roles).
form.permissionHelp: Optional permission required to access this endpoint.

createSuccess.title: Endpoint created
createSuccess.description: The new endpoint is now registered in the platform.

updateSuccess.title: Endpoint updated
